species: Three bacterial acidophile species were used: Leptospirillum ferriphilumT DSM 14647, Sulfobacillus thermosulfidooxidansT DSM 9293, and Acidithiobacillus caldusT DSM 8584.
cell_type: Cells were maintained in the exponential growth phase...
sample_source: Chalcopyrite mineral concentrate from the Aitik copper mine...
